web.title: tga2tpc - Modding Tools - Deadly Stream
web.description: tga2tpc Author: ndix UR Release: Sep 2020 Version: 4.0.0 Convert TGA images to TPC format for use in KotOR and TSL. TPC files contain the information from a TXI file (so the TXI file is no longer needed when a TPC file is used), and can be uncompressed or compressed with either DXT1 or DXT5. Adva...

web.title: GitHub - seedhartha/kotorblender: Blender add-on to import & export KotOR models · GitHub
web.description: Create a symlink on Linux: ln -s $(pwd)/io_scene_kotor ~/.config/blender/3.6/scripts/addons/io_scene_kotor · Extract models, textures, walkmeshes, LYT and PTH files into a working directory, using a tool of your choice, e.g. reone toolkit. Recommended directory structure: data — extract all BIF archives here without subdirectories ... If you plan to edit textures, batch-convert TPC to TGA / TXI files using reone toolkit, although TPC textures are also supported by KotorBlender.

web.title: GitHub - OpenKotOR/HoloPatcher · GitHub
web.description: HoloPatcher is a rewrite of TSLPatcher written in Python, utilizing the PyKotor library.
